inputs.label: Value
inputs.businessContext: The numerical value in circular mils (or kcmil if scale factor is 1000).

businessContext_i18n.en: The numerical value in circular mils (or kcmil if scale factor is 1000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dairesel mil (veya ölçek faktörü 1000 ise kcmil) cinsinden sayısal değer.

inputs.label: Unit Scale
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 for cmil, 1000 for kcmil.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 for cmil, 1000 for kcmil.
businessContext_i18n.tr: cmil için 1, kcmil için 1000 olarak ayarlayın.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Physical constant: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 sqmm. Do not change unless for verification.

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical constant: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 sqmm. Do not change unless for verification.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel sabit: 1 cmil = 0.000506707479 mm². Doğrulama dışında değiştirmeyin.

inputs.label: Precision (Decimals)
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for output.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
